languageSwitcher.label: Language
languageSwitcher.description: Used across the admin UI. Your choice is remembered on this device.

workspaceSwitcher.discoverDialogDescription: Search and request to join public workspaces in your org. Private workspaces are invite-only.

workspace.createDescription: Workspaces hold agents, members, and shared registry. You become the owner of any workspace you create. The system identifier is generated automatically.
workspace.renameDescription: Change the workspace display name. The system identifier is permanent and not editable.
workspace.archiveDescription: Archive "{{name}}"? The workspace will disappear from the switcher; existing members and agents stay in the database but become unreachable through the workspace JOIN.
workspace.archiveMarketplaceDependents: If capabilities published by this workspace are still used by Agents in other workspaces, archive will be blocked. Unpublish first and wait for those workspaces to remove the capabilities.

join.title: Request to join "{{name}}"
join.reasonPlaceholder: Optional — tell the admin why you'd like to join
join.reasonTooLong: Reason must be 1000 characters or less

landing.loginRequired: Sign in to request access to "{{name}}"
landing.notFoundDescription: It may have been deleted, or it doesn't accept public join requests. Contact the workspace admin to request access.
landing.privateTitle: This workspace doesn't accept public join requests
landing.privateDescription: Contact the workspace admin to be invited.
landing.pendingTitle: Request submitted — waiting for admin approval
landing.pendingDescription: You'll be added automatically once an admin approves.
landing.successDescription: An admin will be notified; you can revisit this page to check the status.

login.title: Parsar
login.subtitle: Team agent control plane
login.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
login.noAccountHint: First time here? Ask your admin for an invite.

errors.too_common: Choose a password that’s harder to guess

setup.title: Welcome to Parsar
setup.subtitle: This install has no owner yet. Create the first account to get started — you will become the workspace owner.
setup.closedBody: This install already has an owner. Sign in with your existing account.

onboarding.title: Create your first workspace
onboarding.subtitle: A workspace is a shared space where your team collaborates on agents. You'll be its Owner.

empty.title: We couldn't find that page
empty.description: The page you requested has been merged or removed.

workspace.title: Choose a Workspace to view {{resource}}
workspace.description: This data is managed by Workspace. Choose a Workspace in the header first.
